titles.title: Whose Report Would You Believe – V2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Whose report Will you believe, We shall believe The report of the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His report says I am healed, His report says I am sealed, His report says I am free, His report says victory.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His report says I am healed, His report says I am filled, His report says I am free, His report says victory.
